name: ellipsis_conj_objc
question: Find all ellipsis clauses that start with a conjunction and an object
mql:
SELECT ALL OBJECTS WHERE
[clause typ=Ellp
   [phrase first function=Conj]
   ..
   [phrase function=Objc]
]
GO

name: niphal_verbs
question: Find all Niphal verbs in the Hebrew Bible
mql:
SELECT ALL OBJECTS WHERE
[word sp=verb AND vs=nif
   GET g_word_utf8, gloss
]
GO

name: bara_occurrences
question: Where does the verb bara (create) occur in the text?
mql: SELECT ALL OBJECTS WHERE [verse GET book, chapter, verse [word sp=verb AND lex='BR>[' GET g_word_utf8, gloss]] GO

name: object_phrases
question: Find all object phrases in the Hebrew Bible
mql:
SELECT ALL OBJECTS WHERE
[phrase function=Objc
   GET function
]
GO

name: imperative_verbs
question: Find all imperative verb forms
mql:
SELECT ALL OBJECTS WHERE
[word sp=verb AND vt=impv
   GET g_word_utf8, gloss
]
GO

name: nominal_clause_with_subject
question: Find nominal clauses that contain a subject phrase
mql:
SELECT ALL OBJECTS WHERE
[clause typ=NmCl
   [phrase function=Subj]
]
GO

name: construct_chain_nouns
question: Find noun phrases that contain a construct-chain (regens-rectum) relationship
mql:
SELECT ALL OBJECTS WHERE
[phrase typ=NP
   [subphrase rela=rec]
]
GO

name: feminine_plural_nouns
question: Find all feminine plural nouns
mql:
SELECT ALL OBJECTS WHERE
[word sp=subs AND gn=f AND nu=pl
   GET g_word_utf8, gloss
]
GO

name: wayyiqtol_clause_subject
question: Find wayyiqtol clauses that have a subject phrase
mql:
SELECT ALL OBJECTS WHERE
[clause typ=WayX
   [phrase function=Subj]
]
GO

name: verse_proper_nouns_genesis
question: Where do proper nouns occur in Genesis?
mql:
SELECT ALL OBJECTS WHERE
[verse book=Genesis GET book, chapter, verse
   [word sp=nmpr GET g_word_utf8, gloss]
]
GO

name: verbal_clause_pred_obj
question: Find verbal clauses where the predicate is followed by an object phrase
mql:
SELECT ALL OBJECTS WHERE
[clause kind=VC
   [phrase function=Pred]
   ..
   [phrase function=Objc]
]
GO

name: construct_chain_nouns

[phrase typ=NP

      ..
      [subphrase rela=atr]
   ]
]
GO
